task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged in as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger dashboard or home page is visible, and the user 'admin' is indicated in the top navigation bar or profile menu.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Full Body Workout' routine is selected for the new session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Add Workout Session' or 'Log Workout' form, the routine dropdown or selection field clearly shows 'Full Body Workout'.

task_completion.description: Verify today's date and the 'General' impression are set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field in the form contains the current date, and the impression field (often a dropdown or radio button) is set to 'General'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required note is entered in the session form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Felt strong today' is visible in the notes, comments, or description text area of the workout session form.

task_completion.description: Verify the workout session was saved and successfully logged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Successfully saved') is visible, or the newly created session appears in the workout log/calendar displaying the 'Full Body Workout' routine, the 'General' impression, and the note 'Felt strong today'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) navigating to http://localhost, not terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual wger fitness manager UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is the wger web interface, not a text editor, a mock HTML page, or a generic notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the form rather than just filling it out and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a screenshot showing the state after clicking save/submit, such as a success notification toast, a redirected page, or the session listed in the log.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is the 'wger fitness manager' running locally. The target routine is exactly 'Full Body Workout'. The required impression setting is 'General'. The required note is exactly 'Felt strong today'. The date must correspond to the current date when the task was executed.
